Shri Mataji responds to the question.
Particular?
Is there a particular advice to keep the Sahasrara open?
All right, I'll answer this also.
Shri Mataji will answer this question once and for all.
No, I can answer this question now.
It's very simple as I told you that the deity of Sahastrara is sitting before you.
That the deity of Sahastrara is the Mahamaya.
That try not to understand Her through your reasoning and imagination.
But by surrendering absolutely to it, you keep your Sahastrara open.
In case you still find, just one sentence more, it is still closed, you have to ask
for forgiveness from the deity, that if we have by mistake, made any mistakes, so please
forgive us, that's all.
The deity of the Sahasrara, you know what it is. It is in front of you, but it is the great illusion.
We cannot approach it neither by intellect nor by imagination.
So we must give up.
And to open the Sahasrara, if the Sahasrara is not open, we must ask forgiveness.
Si je fais par erreur, je me suis amant des erreurs, s'il vous plaît pardonnez-moi.
All right.
Now what is the another question?
It's a very specific question. It is advised that children should sleep in the same room as the parents.
But if they wake up four or five times during the night, is it possible to put them in a separate room?
No, no. Then the mother should sleep with the child.
And the father should sleep in another room.
Mother should never leave the child.
Moreover, I would advise you that now you have children.
Don't get too much involved with your children.
That's a dangerous thing.
This is another phase.
First they get involved with the wives or husbands,
then they get involved with the children.
If you get involved with the children,
then again you have to restart many things.

just a trustee of the child.

are going now writing literature on it.
Don't do like that.

But the children are Mine, not yours.
So you just don't get involved into them
because that's a temptation for you.
Too much involvement in the children is a sign of degradation.
It's only your responsibility to look after it, that's all.
So, tell them.
Now, be careful because the children, the helpers that you received are my children.
You are only the guardians. You simply have the responsibility to arrange an optimal environment for them.
But do not be too attached, do not be too caught in an affection that will degrade you and that will degrade the vibrations.
And mother must be with children, must be with children.
